# goodpro-manager-metaproject

> A CLI-first metaproject workspace: code graph, memory, health, wiki, skills, security, and an MCP server surface for AI agents.

Metaproject Standard version: 0.1.0

## Modules

- [gdctx](.metaproject/modules/gdctx.md) — commands: diff, read, rg, run, show, status
- [gdgraph](.metaproject/modules/gdgraph.md) — commands: affected, build, query
- [gdskills](.metaproject/modules/gdskills.md) — commands: catalog, contracts, create, export, inspect, install, learn, list, route, status, sync, verify
- [gdwiki](.metaproject/modules/gdwiki.md) — commands: check-links, collect, index, new, status, validate
- [health](.metaproject/modules/health.md) — commands: baseline, explain, gate, run, sources, status, trend
- [memory](.metaproject/modules/memory.md) — commands: check, index, ingest, new, reflect, search
- [security](.metaproject/modules/security.md) — commands: check-input, check-output, incidents, policy, redact, report, scan, status
- [tasks](.metaproject/modules/tasks.md) — commands: ac, block, check, complete, freeze, implemented, init, list, start, status, task, unblock
- [testing](.metaproject/modules/testing.md) — commands: analyze, context, explain, init, related, report, run, status

## Generated artifacts

- [.metaproject/data/gdgraph/artifacts/module-map.json](.metaproject/data/gdgraph/artifacts/module-map.json)
